subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-08-22 in Ramleh
subcodes.first_line: When we were living in Adrianople there was a Baktashi who lived close by us. Professionally he was a wood-chopper, socially he was a wit.
subcodes.subjects: @humor; jokes, @banishment to; life in Adrianople, @stories; anecdotes, @work as worship
